## Kind of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New colour theme / signature style
- [ ] New component recipe
- [ ] New export target / framework adapter
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` is green (icon-verify → audits → tsc → vite build)
- [ ] `npx vitest run` is green (re-baselined snapshots with `-u` if I changed tokens, and the diff is only my change)
- [ ] Recipes stay token-driven (`var(--k-*)`, no hardcoded colours/sizes)
- [ ] New components are demonstrated in the gallery **and** used in a live app screen (generic names only)
- [ ] Screenshots below for any visual change
